temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with a bandaged right hand sits in the driver's seat of a car, his head resting on his hand. He looks distressed and sweaty, with his eyes closed as he speaks, conveying a sense of fear and anxiety. (Storyline: The scene opens on a character in a state of high distress, establishing a tense and mysterious atmosphere. His bandaged hand and fearful expression suggest he has recently been in a dangerous situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Fearful, anxious, and slightly desperate. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint ambient sounds.)
(00:04-00:06) The man's expression shifts from distress to a more intense, almost crazed look. He stares forward with wide, fearful eyes, his mouth slightly agape as he continues to speak. (Storyline: The character's emotional state escalates, moving from simple fear to a more volatile and intense state, hinting at a deeper psychological struggle.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Intense, agitated, and fearful. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
